metadata.title: Typing speed
metadata.description: This is a plugin for showing the current typing speed in the status bar

regex.source: .setDesc("choose which metric to use for typing speed")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择用于衡量打字速度的标准")

regex.source: .setDesc("Replicate the word counting functionality of MonkeyType by considering each word as the number of characters divided by 5. While this method may not be as precise for direct word counting, it accounts for the varying lengths of words.")
regex.target: .setDesc("引用 MonkeyType 的单词计数功能，将每个单词视为字符数除以 5 后的值。虽然这种方法可能不如直接单词计数精确，但它考虑到了单词的不同长度。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Present the lowest and highest typing speeds observed, focusing specifically on the worst and best speeds recorded within 3-second intervals. Note that there is more numbers shifting per second so it may be more distracting")
regex.target: .setDesc("列出观察到的最低和最高打字速度，特别是 3 秒钟间隔内记录到的最慢和最快速度。请注意，由于每秒变动的数字较多，因此可能会造成分心")

regex.source: .setDesc("When you stop writing, after 3 seconds the typing speed display will darken or hide.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当您停止书写时，打字速度显示将在3 秒钟后变暗或隐藏。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Tweak the ordering in the status bar, to try to put the typing speed at first. Generally used to avoid shifting issue when trying to hide the typing speed. (This is a hack and may create little visual issues with other plugin)")
regex.target: .setDesc("调整状态栏的排序，尽量将打字速度放在前面。一般用于避免在隐藏打字速度时，出现移动问题。（这项技术涉及篡改，因而可能会与其他插件产生一些视觉问题）")

regex.source: .addOption("darken", "darken - only make the status less visible")
regex.target: .addOption("darken", "变暗 - 仅使状态不那么明显")
